title: NeuralTrust AI Runtime Security / Generative Application Firewall (GAF)
description: NeuralTrust Generative Application Firewall enforces zero-trust policies across agents, tools, and APIs, applying runtime guardrails, monitoring agent behavior for anomalies, and enabling secure, policy-driven interactions with real-time threat detection and human oversight.

items: Enforce zero-trust policies between agents, tools, & external APIs, Apply & manage runtime Guardrails
Runtime guardrails & moderation; anomalous tool use
